reasoning: The control requires monitoring system security alerts and advisories, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring audit logging is enabled to capture security-related events, configuring admission controllers to alert on security policy violations, setting up Prometheus for monitoring and alerting on security metrics, and configuring an event alerting system to notify administrators of security events.
title: 3_14_3: 3.14.3 Monitor system security alerts and advisories and take action in response
